catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for Near-Real-Time Satellite Wave Products from MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL, detailing specifications and updates for WAVE_GLO_PHY_SWH_L3_NRT_014_001, WAVE_GLO_PHY_SWH_L4_NRT_014_003, and WAVE_GLO_PHY_SPC_L3_NRT_014_009 products.

variables.long_name: Spectral Directional Variance Density of Sea Surface Waves
